products.name: Sepela Cinema
products.description: End-to-end streaming platform with adaptive delivery, content management, and analytics built for broadcasters and OTT providers.
products.content:
Sepela Cinema is a production-grade streaming and media operations platform designed for broadcasters, OTT providers, and enterprise media teams.

Deploy adaptive bitrate delivery, multi-tenant content management, and real-time audience analytics from a single control plane.

Our platform integrates with existing encoding pipelines and CDN providers while giving operations teams the visibility they need to maintain broadcast-quality experiences at scale.

products.name: Sepela ERP
products.description: Unified point-of-sale and inventory system with automated tax compliance, multi-branch sync, and regulatory reporting.
products.content:
Sepela ERP unifies point-of-sale, inventory, and compliance workflows for retail and hospitality operators.

Automate tax calculations, synchronize stock across branches, and generate audit-ready reports without manual reconciliation.

Built for multi-location businesses that need reliable offline-capable POS with centralized oversight.

products.name: Sepela Event
products.description: Fraud-resistant ticketing engine with dynamic QR validation, seat mapping, and real-time capacity management.
products.content:
Sepela Event delivers secure digital ticketing for venues, festivals, and enterprise conferences.

Dynamic QR validation, seat mapping, and live capacity dashboards help organizers reduce fraud and improve gate throughput.

Integrate with payment providers and access control systems through our API-first architecture.

products.name: Sepela E-Voting
products.description: Secure digital voting platform for competitions, awards, and organizational elections with auditable results.
products.content:
Sepela E-Voting is built for competitions, pageants, awards ceremonies, and organizational elections that need transparent, tamper-resistant balloting.

Voters cast ballots from web or mobile with real-time tallying, role-based access, and exportable audit logs for organizers and judges.

Configure voting windows, eligibility rules, and multi-round elimination formats — details and branding can be updated as your event takes shape.
